summary: Homepage performance dropped further to 64 (LCP 6.4 s), extending a persistent multi-audit regression well below the 85 threshold with no structural fix applied; /about remains an empty placeholder with SEO at 83, and /projects stays below 85 at 83.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark contact footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page still contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on a near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, five project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar, Dependency Upgrade Planner) in a 2-column desktop grid with the fifth card left-aligned, and a dark contact footer visible on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, amber disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

score_deltas: / performance 71 → 64 (-7 pts — material drop, persistent regression now at new lowest recorded point, well below 85 threshold)
/ lcp_ms 6540 → 6422 (-118 ms, effectively stable — still critically slow above 6 s)
/projects/note-structurer performance 81 → 87 (+6 pts — recovery, now above 85 threshold)
top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.4 s, performance score 64, now at its worst recorded point across many consecutive audits): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold — this remains the single highest-impact unresolved issue on the site.
issue_title: Homepage performance 64 (LCP 6.4 s) — worst recorded score yet; /projects still below 85; /about still empty placeholder
issue_body:
## Homepage performance is worsening — new lowest score recorded

The homepage (`/`) scored **64** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-19), with LCP at **6,422 ms** — a further 7-point drop from yesterday's 71, and the lowest performance score recorded across all audits. No structural fix has been applied.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 64 | -7 pts (new lowest recorded point) |
| LCP | 6,422 ms | -118 ms (effectively stable, still critically slow) |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 188 ms | +17 ms (within jitter) |

### Suggested fix
Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF sized for mobile viewports, and defer render-blocking stylesheets/scripts above the fold. This is the same recommendation from prior audits — it has not yet been actioned.

---

## `/projects` still below 85

`/projects` held at 83 for a second consecutive audit. LCP is stable at ~3.66 s. If this does not recover to ≥85 in the next audit, investigate shared bundle size or serverless cold-start impact.

| Page | Previous | Current | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| /projects | 83 | 83 | stable, still below threshold |

Note: `/projects/note-structurer` recovered to 87 (+6 pts) — no longer a concern.

---

## Still open — `/about` placeholder

`/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text "This is an about page" only — no nav, no footer, no real content). SEO score is **83**, below the 85 threshold. Unchanged across multiple consecutive audits.

### Suggested fix
Build out the About page with real content, navigation, and footer. This will also resolve the below-threshold SEO score.
